entries.definition: Extremely tired or exhausted; depleted of energy.
entries.exampleSentence: After the long shift, she felt completely drained.

entries.definition: Emptied of liquid or contents; having had fluid removed.
entries.exampleSentence: The rain had drained the pond dry.

entries.definition: (past participle) To cause something to lose liquid or energy; to remove contents by flowing away or by deliberate action.
entries.exampleSentence: They drained the water from the pool before winter.
